# 🌍 Air Quality Index (AQI) Data Analysis Project

![Python](https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-3.x-blue?logo=python)
![Pandas](https://img.shields.io/badge/Pandas-Data%20Analysis-orange?logo=pandas)
![NumPy](https://img.shields.io/badge/NumPy-Numerical%20Computing-blue?logo=numpy)
![Jupyter](https://img.shields.io/badge/Jupyter-Notebook-orange?logo=jupyter)



---

## 📌 Overview
This project focuses on analyzing **Air Quality Index (AQI)** data collected from **15 different cities over a span of 15 years**. The dataset was sourced from Kaggle and processed using Python libraries such as **NumPy** and **Pandas**.

The primary goal of this project is to explore air pollution trends, clean large-scale datasets, and extract meaningful insights through data analysis techniques.

---

## 📊 Dataset Details
- 📍 Cities Covered: 15
- 📅 Time Span: 15 Years
- 📦 Source: Kaggle
- 📁 Format: Large structured dataset (CSV)

---

## 🛠️ Tools & Technologies Used
- 🐍 Python
- 📊 Pandas
- 🔢 NumPy
- 📓 Jupyter Notebook

---

## 🔍 Key Work Done

### 1. Data Cleaning
- Handled missing values and null entries  
- Removed inconsistencies and duplicate records  
- Standardized column formats  

### 2. Data Processing
- Used Pandas DataFrames for large dataset handling  
- Performed indexing, slicing, and transformations  
- Applied filtering techniques  

### 3. Data Analysis
- Explored AQI trends across cities and years  
- Compared pollution levels  
- Generated statistical summaries  

### 4. Data Filtering & Summarization
- City-wise and year-wise filtering  
- GroupBy aggregations  
- Extracted patterns and insights  

---

## 📈 Highlights
- Efficient handling of **large datasets**
- Strong use of **Pandas operations**
- Real-world **data cleaning application**
- Insightful **environmental data trends**

---

## 🚀 Learning Outcomes
- Mastery of Pandas & NumPy basics  
- Real-world dataset handling  
- Data preprocessing techniques  
- Analytical thinking improvement
